message:
fix(vendored): clean up TODO/FIXME comments in mux and term crates

- kitty.rs: include EINVAL in error message for dual i=/I= parameters
  (removes TODO: send an EINVAL error back here)
- ssh.rs: replace vague TODO with explanatory comment on TerminalWaker
  panic — SSH shims use their own I/O, waking is inapplicable
- termwiztermtab.rs: same TerminalWaker clarification for TermWiz applets
- tmux.rs: pass "tmux" workspace to new_empty_window (removes TODO)
- termwiztermtab.rs: clarify dummy writer FIXME — Vec sink is correct
  for TermWiz applets that use render_rx for output

Validated: mux + term crates compile clean via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
